@graph.name: bicycling-energy-model — research package
@graph.description: Two models of the mechanical energy (and time) of pedalling a route — a closed-form law E ≈ α·x + β·(h₊ − ε·h₋) and a Martin-1998 forward-dynamics simulation — run on shared physical constants and validated against power-meter rides. The package holds the derivation notes (spec), the browser comparison app, the validation harnesses, the numbered research journal (verbatim prompts preserved), the article drafts (EN and pt-BR), and a machine-readable claims–questions–evidence graph.

@graph.name: Bicycle Route Energy in Closed Form: Two Corrections, a Descent-Recovery Offset That Transfers Across Riders, and an Energy↔Time Dual
Energy model comparison app
@graph.description: Self-contained, build-step-free browser app: canonical forward-dynamics vs the closed form on shared constants, plus the deployed Simujaules per-edge realisation (v2Edge), GPX/FIT import, and per-regime power extraction.

@graph.name: Derivation notes (model spec)
@graph.description: The energy law and its α, β, ε; the local recovery ε(s) and its descent-height-weighted aggregate; the per-edge v2Edge realisation; the climb-aero correction; the time model x* = x + k₊·h₊ − k₋·h₋ and the ε↔k₋ bridge. Kept in sync with the code by convention.

@graph.name: Model comparison journal
@graph.description: Numbered, reverse-chronological research journal (22 entries): verbatim human prompts, hypotheses, pre-registered protocols and endpoints, results, and verdicts, with per-entry code provenance (commit hashes).

@graph.name: Claims–questions–evidence graph (journal Entries 17–22)
@graph.description: RDF/Turtle graph: research questions, hypotheses, pre-registered protocols (P-Plan), harness runs (PROV-O), assertions with polarized evidence lines (SEPIO pattern), and typed inter-entry citation links (CiTO).

@graph.name: Validation harnesses
@graph.description: Node.js harnesses that regenerate every published number from the raw recordings: compare, censo_compare, eps_hypothesis, eps_sp_test, time_compare, per-rider inventory+compare pairs (ppaz_*, jaam_*, danlessa_*), param_fit / cda_estimate, regime_compare, verify_v2edge_clamp, igc_resolution_test, goal_calibration, scale_trio, bootstrap_ci. Each ports the app's engines verbatim (hand-kept-in-sync).

@graph.name: Power-only sample ride (no GPS; committed fixture)
Raw ride recordings (NOT distributed)
@graph.description: FIT files (GPS + power) from the author and two independent riders (full activity-history exports shared with informed consent), plus source spreadsheets. Excluded from version control and from this crate's payload: they carry location and private-activity data. Every published number regenerates from them with one command per harness; per-ride aggregate CSVs with coordinates stripped are available on request.
@graph.conditionsOfAccess: Available on request from the author, coordinates stripped; raw tracks are never distributed.
